findings.invariant_violated: What ships to production is the artifact CI validated.
findings.evidence: The deploy job rebuilds from source at deploy time rather than promoting the CI-built image; the deployed digest never matches the one the test job signed off on.
findings.why_proof_missed: Every check is green — they all ran against a different artifact than the one that shipped. Nothing compared the two.
findings.root_correction: Promote the validated image by digest at the delivery boundary.
